name: Bloom Harvest
description: A faction is systematically harvesting Bloom essence from the Hollow, using it to empower their rituals and create an army of bloom-touched soldiers. The Harvest must be stopped before the Reach is consumed.
finaleDungeonFeel: An overgrown cathedral of living bloom. Walls pulse with bioluminescent veins. Roots choke the corridors. The air is thick with spores that drift like snow. At the heart, a massive bloom-heart throbs with stolen essence, tended by zealots who have become one with the growth.

events.name: Bloom Sightings Increase
events.description: Reports of bloom-creature sightings have tripled near the Hollow border.

events.name: Contaminated Well
events.description: A town well has been contaminated with bloom essence. The locals are getting sick.

events.name: Harvest Convoy Spotted
events.description: A convoy bearing bloom essence has been spotted on the roads.

events.name: Bloom Creature Attack
events.description: Bloom-creatures have attacked a village near the Reach.

events.name: Ritual Site Discovered
events.description: scouts have located a major bloom-essence ritual site.

events.name: Harvest Accelerates
events.description: The bloom harvest has intensified. The Hollow itself seems to be growing toward the Reach.

events.name: The Bloom Heart
events.description: The source of the harvest has been found. A final expedition must destroy the bloom-heart before it's too late.
